Lebanon Station Planned Outage -- COMPLETE


Notice Text:

Texas Eastern has completed the previously posted Lebanon compressor station outage ahead of schedule and the station has been returned to normal operations, all restrictions associated with this outage have been lifted. 

 

Effective immediately, capacities on the upper 24" will be raised to the following:

 

Station                        Capacity

Berne                           701,000 Dth/d

Sarahsville                   701,000 Dth/d

Somerset                     701,000 Dth/d

Five Points                  798,000 Dth/d

Lebanon                      796,000 Dth/d

 

Please reference the TE planned outage schedule for upper 24" capacities on future gas days.

 

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.

 



BackPrint

Five Points                  798,000 Dth/d
